mnemonics: S.P.I.C.E.D. for Cloud Characteristics (Service Models): SaaS, PaaS, IaaS, CaaS, DaaS
keyPoints: Distributed systems form the foundational architecture for cloud computing.
The core cloud service models are IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS, offering varying levels of abstraction and control.
Security in the cloud is a shared responsibility model between the provider and the customer.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is solely responsible for all security (Shared Responsibility Model).
Confusing the different cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS) and their respective management responsibilities.
